blended.narrative: Hunter Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.9" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 34°F.
